name: Ember of the Daeva
description: Notes This is an Antinomy Gear item.
effects: On Taking Damage: When health drops below 50%, spawns a healing spirit who heals for 5 seconds Healing Spirit Effect: Heals up to 5 players within 5 tiles by 80 HP per second Cooldown: 25 seconds On Taking Damage: When health drops below 75%, DEF Boost (+15 DEF) for 10 seconds Cooldown: 20 seconds
